architecture: shared measured outer form + measured interior voids (voids.scad). Three variants: (1) parts on outline.scad station loft; (2) body0_whole.scad = parts reunited, one piece; (3) body0_parametric.scad = FUSED PARAMETRIC model (sections = hull of 4 circles via circle-circle corner intersections; DOME y[9.2,21.6] fully law-driven, arc/linear laws rms 0.03-0.17; MID via 12 semantic named control stations; BACK control stations + flange feature)

parametric.residual_analysis: dominant residual is a distributed ~0.2mm shell on the MID-zone flanks: the per-section 4-arc representation itself (fit p90 0.2-0.3mm there), not station spacing; DOME laws hold at rms 0.03-0.17. Next candidates if >0.9634 needed: 6-arc sections in MID, refit dome side-radius law, densify control stations
parametric.author_policy: parametric editable form preferred while >=0.95 and cost quantified (spec met)
